name: Marshall Boya Ve Vernik Sanayii A.S.
summary: Marshall Boya Ve Vernik Sanayii A.S. operates as a paints and coatings company in Turkey. It also offers manufacturing industrial, specialty, and other chemicals; and petrol rubber and plastic products, as well as polyester, acrylic, and vinyl polymer based paints and varnishes. The company offers its products through dealers and stores. Marshall Boya Ve Vernik Sanayii A.S. was incorporated in 1965 and is headquartered in Dilovasi, Turkey.
